name: boss-cli
description: BOSS 直聘 in your terminal — search jobs, view recommendations, manage applications, and chat with recruiters via reverse-engineered API.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Authenticate via browser cookies or QR code

commands.name: show
commands.description: View job details by index from last listing

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export search results to CSV or JSON

commands.name: batch-greet
commands.description: Bulk outreach to recruiters with rate-limiting

use_cases: Search and filter job listings by keyword and location
Export job search results for analysis
Automate recruiter outreach with batch greetings
agent_metadata.example_workflow: boss search 'Python开发' --city 北京 --json | jq '.[].title'
